applicability_notes: Unary composite op that zeroes elements above the main diagonal (lower-triangular mask). Golden is torch.tril applied directly to the input tensor. Common usage: building causal attention masks, e.g. ttnn.expand to [B,1,S,S] followed by ttnn.tril, then (mask - 1.0) * inf — making it a candidate for fusion into causal-mask construction chains (expand -> tril -> sub -> mul).

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [batch_size, 1, seq_len, seq_len] causal attention mask, expanded from [batch_size, 1, 1, seq_len]
placement_observations.source: qwen2_5_vl attention mask construction call site: attention_mask = ttnn.expand(attention_mask, [-1, -1, seq_len, -1]); attention_mask = ttnn.tril(attention_mask); output later cloned to bfloat4_b — memory_config not explicitly specified at call site
